hero.description:
For individuals who want real skills.
For companies who need reliable workers.

REAL BUILDER transforms beginners into skilled, certified builders - fully equipped, job-ready to raise the standard from day one.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: From Base experience to certified professional. Faster than you can imagine.

steps.s1_desc: Sign up and tell us about your background and goals. We'll match you with the right training path.
steps.s2_desc: Participate in high-intensity, on-site learning in Portuguese or English. From safety fundamentals to specialized techniques.
steps.s3_desc: Weekend hands-on training (Fri-Sun) with real tools and experienced professionals.
steps.s4_desc: Earn your RB1 Certificate after 1-4 weekends of training. Your first milestone to a professional career!
steps.s5_desc: Get your fully equipped vehicle to start working as a professional builder.

courses.title: COURSES
courses.subtitle: Master specialized skills in high-demand construction trades. All courses include theory, practice, and certification.

about.title: ABOUT REAL BUILDER
about.p1: To become a Real Builder is more than a profession.
about.p2: It is a mindset. A statement. A way of life.
about.p3: Real Builder is about taking your career, your income, and your personal standards to the next level.
about.p4: To earn more, you must become more.
about.p5: This is your opportunity to unlock your real potential — starting tomorrow — and build a stronger future.
about.p6: By joining Real Builder, you become part of something that has never existed before:
about.p7: A new generation of construction professionals.
about.p8: Intelligent. Business-minded. Physically strong. Mentally sharp.
about.p9: You are not just a worker.
about.p11: Real Builder is a new standard of personality.

contact.title: Ready to start your
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our courses, membership, or vehicle solutions? Our team is here to help you become a Real Builder.

footer.description: Empowering the next generation of builders with practical skills, vehicles, and global opportunities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Real Builder academy, our courses, and your future career in construction.

questions.a1: Real Builder is a premier construction academy in Portugal dedicated to transforming individuals with basic or no experience into certified, job-ready construction professionals. We focus on intensive, hands-on training to meet the high demand of the modern construction industry.
questions.q2: How does the certification process work?
questions.a2: Our certification process is divided into levels (RB1, RB2, RB3). You start with foundational safety and basic skills, progressing to specialized techniques in areas like plumbing, electrical work, carpentry, and masonry. Each level requires passing rigorous practical exams.
questions.q3: Do I need prior construction experience to join?
questions.a3: No prior experience is required for our foundational RB1 courses. We welcome anyone with the right mindset, physical readiness, and willingness to learn. We provide all the necessary tools and knowledge from day one.
questions.q4: What is the job placement rate after graduation?
questions.a4: We are proud of our 93% job placement rate. Thanks to our strong partnerships with leading construction companies across Portugal, our certified Real Builders have direct pathways to high-paying, stable employment immediately after graduation.
questions.q5: Are the courses taught in English or Portuguese?
questions.a5: To accommodate a diverse range of students, including locals and expatriates, our high-intensity, on-site learning programs are available in both Portuguese and English.
questions.q6: How long does it take to get certified?
questions.a6: The initial RB1 certification (Getting Started) typically takes between 1 to 4 weekends, depending on the specific course track. Advanced certifications (RB2 and RB3) require additional specialized training modules.

sections.s1_content: Welcome to Real Builder Academy. These Terms and Conditions govern the access and use of our website and the services provided by Real Builder Academy, based at Avenida Mateus Teixeira Azevedo 55, Tavira, Portugal.
sections.s1_content2: By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our website.
sections.s2_content: Real Builder Academy offers professional training courses in the construction area, including, but not limited to, drywall installation, tiling, and underfloor heating installation.
sections.s2_content2: Enrollment in courses is subject to availability, compliance with admission requirements, and payment of the respective fees, when applicable.
sections.s3_content: By submitting an enrollment form, the user guarantees that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.
sections.s3_content2: Specific payment conditions, cancellation, and refund policies will be communicated to the user at the time of formalizing the enrollment in the respective course.
sections.s4_content: All content present on this website, including texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, is the property of Real Builder Academy or its content providers and is protected by Portuguese and international copyright laws.
sections.s4_content2: Reproduction, duplication, copying, selling, reselling, or exploiting any part of the website for commercial purposes without our express written consent is not permitted.
sections.s5_content: The collection and processing of personal data are carried out in accordance with our Privacy Policy, in strict compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable legislation.
sections.s6_content: Real Builder Academy makes every effort to ensure that the information presented on the website is accurate and up-to-date. However, we do not guarantee the absence of errors or omissions.
sections.s6_content2: Real Builder Academy will not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this website or the services offered.
sections.s7_content: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms and Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the website after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms and Conditions.
sections.s8_content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and interpreted in accordance with Portuguese law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from the interpretation or execution of these Terms, the court of the district of Faro is competent, with express waiver of any other.
sections.s9_content: For any questions related to these Terms and Conditions, please contact us via:

sections.s1_content: Real Builder Academy respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information when you visit our website or use our services, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - Regulation (EU) 2016/679).
sections.s2_content: The entity responsible for processing your personal data is Real Builder Academy, based at Avenida Mateus Teixeira Azevedo 55, Tavira, Portugal.
sections.s3_content: We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:
sections.s3_item1: Identification Data: First name, last name.
sections.s3_item2: Contact Data: Email address, phone number, city, district.
sections.s3_item3: Professional and Academic Data: Education level, language skills, digital skills, experience in the construction area, CV and certificates (when submitted).
sections.s3_item4: Browsing Data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on our website (via cookies).
sections.s4_content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
sections.s4_item1: Enrollment Management: To process your application for our courses and assess your eligibility. (Basis: Execution of contract or pre-contractual steps).
sections.s4_item2: Communication: To respond to information requests, send updates about courses, and notifications of enrollment openings. (Basis: Consent or legitimate interest).
sections.s4_item3: Service Improvement: To analyze website use and improve user experience. (Basis: Legitimate interest).
sections.s4_item4: Legal Compliance: To comply with legal obligations to which we are subject. (Basis: Legal obligation).
sections.s5_content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. We may share your data only with:
sections.s5_item1: Service providers acting on our behalf (e.g., web hosting services, form management platforms like Formspree).
sections.s5_item2: Competent authorities, when required by law.
sections.s6_content: We keep your personal data only for the period strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes for which they were collected, or to comply with legal, tax, or regulatory obligations.
sections.s7_content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
sections.s7_item1: Request access to your personal data.
sections.s7_item2: Request rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data.
sections.s7_item3: Request erasure of your data ('right to be forgotten').
sections.s7_item5: Object to the processing of your data.
sections.s7_item7: Withdraw consent at any time (without compromising the lawfulness of processing based on consent previously given).
sections.s7_footer: To exercise these rights, please contact us via phone +351 939 996 924. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the National Data Protection Commission (CNPD) in Portugal.
sections.s8_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure, or access.
sections.s9_content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We recommend that you review this page regularly to stay informed about how we protect your data.
